headline: 10 contract addresses catalogued across Ethereum, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism, BSC, and Avalanche; 1 multisig owner and 6 native+bridged token contracts identified.

findings.text: Etherscan name-tag search returned the primary USDT token 0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7 tagged 'Tether: USDT Stablecoin' and the owner multisig 0xC6CDE7C39eB2f0F0095F41570af89eFC2C1Ea828 tagged 'Tether: Multisig'. Arbiscan returned 0xFd086bC7CD5C481DCC9C85ebE478A1C0b69FCbb9 tagged 'USDT0: USD₮0 Token' as an EIP-1967 proxy. Optimistic Etherscan returned 0x94b008aA00579c1307B0EF2c499aD98a8ce58e58 tagged 'Tether: USDT Token' (bridged). BscScan returned 0x55d398326f99059fF775485246999027B3197955 tagged 'BUSD-T Stablecoin'. Snowtrace returned 0x9702230A8Ea53601f5cD2dc00fDBc13d4dF4A8c7 tagged 'Tether: Tether Token' as TransparentUpgradeableProxy.

No canonical 'Deployed contracts' page was found on tether.to. The tether.to/transparency page exists but provides reserve attestation data, not contract addresses. No deployed_contracts_doc discovered.
No audit PDFs are linked in protocol.audit_links (none recorded). No audit reports were discovered during website/docs walk.

GitHub org 'tetherto' hosts Tether-Near repo. GitHub org 'tethercoin' hosts a USDT repo referencing the Ethereum address. No Foundry broadcast or hardhat-deploy artifacts with multi-chain deployment data were found. The verified source code is primarily available on block explorers.

Multi-chain enumeration performed for Ethereum, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism, BSC, and Avalanche via block explorer searches. Tron (non-EVM) USDT address TR7NHqjeKQxGTCi8q8ZY4pL8otSzgjLj6t surfaced from a bridge docs page but is non-EVM and outside DeFiPunkd scope.
No factory contracts identified for Tether. USDT is a single-token protocol per chain, not a factory pattern.
Role taxonomy applied: token (USDT on each chain), multisig (owner on Ethereum), proxy implementation contracts on Arbitrum and Avalanche.

All admin_addresses entries are backed by fetched evidence from block explorer search results. Multisig constructor args show initial 1-of-1 configuration; third-party analysis (bhemen/usdt) reports current 3-of-6, but live state was not read via DeFiPunkd API this run.

rationale.verdict: Discovery catalogued 10 addresses across 6 EVM chains. On-chain reads via DeFiPunkd API were not performed (search tool only); multisig threshold and current owners could not be verified live. Grade is unknown per discovery slice rules.

evidence.shows: Etherscan confirms 0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7 is named 'Tether: USDT Stablecoin', verified contract, with 330M+ transactions. Constructor args: initialSupply=100000000000, name='Tether USD', symbol='USDT', decimals=6.

Etherscan confirms 0xC6CDE7C39eB2f0F0095F41570af89eFC2C1Ea828 is named 'Tether: Multisig', is a MultiSigWallet contract. Constructor args show initial owners=[0xf4B51B14b9EE30dc37EC970B50a486F37686E2a8] with required=1.

Third-party analysis confirms USDT contract owner is 0xC6CDE7C39eB2f0F0095F41570af89eFC2C1Ea828, described as a 3-of-6 Gnosis Safe multisig. Owner controls issuing, redeeming, blacklisting, clawbacks, and pausing — no role separation. Contract is Ownable, Pausable, and Blacklistable.

Arbiscan confirms 0xFd086bC7CD5C481DCC9C85ebE478A1C0b69FCbb9 as 'USD₮0' token on Arbitrum, using EIP-1967 Transparent Proxy pattern with implementation at 0x3263cd783823d04a6b9819517e0e6840d37ca3f4 (ArbitrumExtensionV2).

Optimistic Etherscan confirms 0x94b008aA00579c1307B0EF2c499aD98a8ce58e58 as 'Tether: USDT Token' on Optimism. This is a bridged token (L2StandardERC20) with onlyL2Bridge mint/burn modifier. Marked as not issued/redeemable by Tether directly.

BscScan confirms 0x55d398326f99059fF775485246999027B3197955 as BUSD-T Stablecoin (BEP20USDT contract). Named 'Tether USD', symbol 'USDT', 18 decimals on BSC. Has Ownable pattern with transferOwnership.
Snowtrace confirms 0x9702230A8Ea53601f5cD2dc00fDBc13d4dF4A8c7 as 'Tether: Tether Token' on Avalanche with 13.7M+ transactions. Tagged with tether.to, Stablecoin, Token Contract, Bitfinex, ERC20.
Snowtrace token page confirms TransparentUpgradeableProxy pattern for Avalanche USDT contract.

Third-party guide confirms USDT contract addresses: Polygon 0xc2132D05D31c914a87C6611C10748AEb04B58e8F, Arbitrum 0xfd086bc7cd5c481dcc9c85ebe478a1c0b69fcbb9. Lists 7 major networks: Ethereum, TRON, BSC, Solana, Avalanche, Polygon, Arbitrum.

Astar/Wanchain bridge documentation lists native Tether USDT addresses across chains including Ethereum 0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7, Polygon 0xc2132D05D31c914a87C6611C10748AEb04B58e8F, Avalanche 0x9702230A8Ea53601f5cD2dc00fDBc13d4dF4A8c7, Arbitrum 0xFd086bC7CD5C481DCC9C85ebE478A1C0b69FCbb9, TRON TR7NHqjeKQxGTCi8q8ZY4pL8otSzgjLj6t.
Official Tether GitHub org 'tetherto' hosts Tether-Near repo with USDT contract source code for Near protocol. Deployment instructions reference owner_id as multisig address.
GitHub org 'tethercoin' hosts USDT repo referencing Ethereum address 0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7.
Derived: Tether Limited is owned by iFinex (BVI). As of Jan 2024, Tether minted on 14+ protocols/blockchains. Launched 2014 as Realcoin.
Transaction showing Tether: Multisig (0xc6cde7c39eb2f0f0095f41570af89efc2c1ea828) executing an Issue call on the USDT contract, confirming it is the active owner performing minting operations.

Arbiscan address page confirms 'USDT0: USD₮0 Token' name tag, with implementation at 0x3263cd783823d04a6b9819517e0e6840d37ca3f4 (ArbitrumExtensionV2). Previously recorded implementation was 0xf31e1ae27e7cd057c1d6795a5a083e0453d39b50.

unknowns: D1: Could not perform on-chain reads via DeFiPunkd API (only web_search tool available); multisig current owners and threshold not verified live
D2: No canonical deployed-contracts documentation page found on tether.to
D3: No audit reports linked or discovered for Tether USDT smart contracts
D4: No official Tether GitHub org with deployment artifacts (broadcast/deployments JSON) found; tetherto and tethercoin orgs exist but lack deployment configs for EVM chains
D5: Polygon USDT address 0xc2132D05D31c914a87C6611C10748AEb04B58e8F confirmed from third-party sources but not directly fetched from polygonscan.com name-tag search
D5: TRON USDT (TR7NHqjeKQxGTCi8q8ZY4pL8otSzgjLj6t) and Solana USDT are non-EVM and outside DeFiPunkd supported chainIds
D8: Multisig 0xC6CDE7C39eB2f0F0095F41570af89eFC2C1Ea828 constructor shows 1-of-1 initial config; bhemen/usdt claims current 3-of-6 but live verification not performed this run
D8: BSC USDT at 0x55d398326f99059fF775485246999027B3197955 is labeled 'Binance-Peg' by CoinGecko — may be a Binance-bridged version rather than Tether-native; ownership needs live verification
D1: Linea, Scroll, Base, Blast, zkSync native Tether USDT addresses not searched due to tool call limits

admin_addresses.role: multisig (owner of USDT on Ethereum; controls issue, redeem, pause, blacklist, destroyBlackFunds, deprecate, setParams)
token (USDT0 proxy on Arbitrum, EIP-1967 TransparentUpgradeableProxy)
token (USDT bridged via L2StandardERC20 on Optimism; mint/burn restricted to L2 bridge)
token (USDT BEP-20 on BSC; Binance-Peg bridged variant, 18 decimals)
token (USDT TransparentUpgradeableProxy on Avalanche, native Tether deployment)
other (initial owner EOA in Tether multisig constructor)

protocol_metadata.about: Tether (USDT) is the world's largest stablecoin by market capitalization, pegged 1:1 to the US dollar. Users purchase USDT from Tether Limited (owned by iFinex/Bitfinex) by depositing fiat, and redeem by burning tokens. The Ethereum contract supports owner-controlled minting (issue), burning (redeem), blacklisting of addresses, destruction of blacklisted funds, pausing of all transfers, and a deprecation/upgrade mechanism. USDT is deployed natively or via bridges across 14+ blockchains including Ethereum, Tron, Avalanche, Polygon, and Arbitrum.
